issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttacked' (when opponent declares an attack), not generic 'Trigger'
Action should be 'Rest' (to rest this card as blocker), not 'PlaySelf'. Blocker keyword means this card can be rested to become attack target—no play involved

DSL describes card play, not blocker mechanics. Blocker is a static keyword ability that allows resting during opponent's attack declaration—this should be represented as a keyword grant or ability, not an effect trigger
